topStories.description: Pope Leo has issued a sharp rebuke following a week of escalating, tense dialogue between Washington and Tehran followed by conflicts, labeling recent threats from the United States as "unacceptable."

topStories.title: H1-B applications from top financial firms drops 10% in Q1FY26 amid Trump's visa policy — What we know
topStories.description: US financial firms saw 10% lower H-1B visa petitions, with JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs leading the drop, following President Donald Trump's visa policy changes, data showed.

topStories.title: FPIs Turn Net Sellers After US-Iran Talks Collapse
topStories.description: Domestic institutional investors stayed net buyers for the 31st day as they bought shares worth Rs 2,432 crore.

dailyNews.title: Zohran Mamdani marks 100 days as NYC mayor: A look at Democratic Socialist's 3 new priorities and 'pothole politics'
dailyNews.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has completed his first 100 days in office. In an event on 12 April, he unveiled three new priorities and aims to fulfil those before his term ends.

dailyNews.title: Assam govt moves SC against anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera
dailyNews.description: The petition was filed on Sunday through advocate Shuvodeep Roy and is likely to be taken up for hearing this week. Pawan Khera was granted bail on April 10 and given a week's time to file an application.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan eyes narrow window to resuscitate US-Iran talks after breakdown

dailyNews.title: Dissent in Congress as Guttedar accuses MLA son’s of running the show in Afzalpur

dailyNews.title: ‘Not in a complete deadlock': Mediators rush to revive US-Iran talks ahead of ceasefire deadline — report
dailyNews.description: Days after the US-Iran talks failed in Pakistan, mediators are now trying to revive the negotiations before the two-week ceasefire ends on 21 April. Turkish and Egyptian foreign ministers spoke to their Pakistani counterpart on 12 April, after which they spoke to Witkoff and Iran's Araghchi.

dailyNews.title: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
dailyNews.description: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.

dailyNews.title: US ‘coming after’ Iran beyond Strait of Hormuz blockade, ex-CENTCOM admiral warns
dailyNews.description: A former top CENTCOM commander warns the U.S.' Strait of Hormuz blockade is just the first step in coming after Iran's regime, praising President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump's meme depicting himself as Jesus Christ draws backlash from allies
dailyNews.description: President Trump's AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus Christ irked Americans on both sides of the aisle, with many calling the post blasphemous.

dailyNews.title: Bishop Barron says Trump ‘owes the pope an apology’
dailyNews.description: Bishop Robert Barron says Trump owes Pope Leo XIV an apology after the president posted scathing remarks on Truth Social criticizing the new pontiff.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns China of 'staggering' 50% tariff if caught supplying military aid to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump warns China could face 50% tariffs if caught supplying military aid to Iran as a sweeping Strait of Hormuz blockade takes effect.

dailyNews.title: Trump congratulates Rory McIlroy on back-to-back Masters wins: 'Becoming more and more a legend'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump congratulated Rory McIlroy on winning the 90th Masters Tournament, calling him a legend who performed tremendously under intense pressure.

dailyNews.title: Iran Blockade Sets Up a Test of Which Side Can Endure More Pain
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to choke off the country’s lifeline with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. But the Iranians are betting that his tolerance for political pain is limited.

dailyNews.title: Trump Said Other Countries Would Help Blockade Iran. So Far, There Are No Takers.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s announcement of a complete U.S. blockade was his latest effort to pressure Iran to negotiate after direct talks over the weekend did not yield an agreement.

dailyNews.title: After Criticizing Pope, Trump Posts Image of Himself as a Jesus-Like Figure
dailyNews.description: The image, which was posted on Truth Social and had disappeared by Monday morning, depicted the president as a divine leader healing the sick. The post prompted an immediate backlash.

dailyNews.title: Many Popes Before Leo Have Been Entangled in Politics. Here Are 5 of Them.
dailyNews.description: Leo XIV, under fire from President Trump, has joined predecessors like Francis and John Paul II in confronting political issues.

dailyNews.title: Judge Dismisses Trump’s Suit Over WSJ Report on Birthday Card to Epstein
dailyNews.description: The judge said President Trump had not “plausibly alleged” that The Journal published the article with actual malice.
